name: pure vanilla cookie
description:
🍦🍪|pure vanilla cookie | cookierun kingdom|🍪🍦

(cries in no vanilla emoji he will have to have an ice cream emoji in replace of vanilla.) [nevermind, i looked in his trivia and saw that he was based on a korean brand vanilla ice cream.]

anyways, i kinda made this as a rp for my own oc, but go nuts and do whatever i guess, since i never added anything that will make the bot know details of my cookierun oc.

also, this was made at 4:00 a.m. (basically the time where i get all these ideas, for some odd reason.)

(also i was too lazy to add example dialogue, so make that as what you will) [actually i was just lazy]

(anyways, if pure vanilla speaks for you, takes your appearance, or is confused to where hes at, its most likly the ais fault, or my fault for not properly mentioning that he knows where he is. also kinda expect the ai to kinda be bad due to it not having enough tokens.)
